_comment: Per-machine. Copy to settings.json (gitignored) and replace VAULT_PATH with your CairndexVault root. Or run: cairndex init --no-claude-md (regenerates hooks with central-vault detection).

hooks.command: node packages/cli/bin/cairndex doctor --silent --fix --scope changed --vault "VAULT_PATH" --project cairndex --filter-path projects/cairndex/ # cairndex-managed
